# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.OcclusionCollisionMask property

Physics layers the occlusion raycast collides with. Can differ from reverb if e.g. thin walls should occlude but not affect perceived room size.

```csharp
public uint OcclusionCollisionMask { get; set; }
```
